---
title: "make sampledata"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Replace with your file path or use a built-in dataset
vdem_full = read.csv('./data/V-Dem-CY-FullOthers-v16_csv/V-Dem-CY-Full+Others-v16.csv')

write.csv(head(vdem_full, 10), file='./data/sampledata/vdem-sample.csv')
```


```{r save}
output_path <- "first_10_rows.csv"

write.csv(first_10, file = output_path, row.names = FALSE)

cat("Saved", nrow(first_10), "rows to:", output_path)
```
